title: Loyalty Program
description: Manage guest loyalty status, points, and rewards.

not_active.title: Loyalty Program is Not Active
not_active.description: To start managing your loyalty program, you first need to enable it in your property settings.

list.empty_state: No guests are enrolled in the loyalty program yet.

adjust_form.reason_placeholder: e.g., Service recovery, welcome gift, etc.

validation.points_required: Please enter a valid number of points.
validation.reason_required: A reason is required for this adjustment.

validation.points_required: Please enter a valid amount or number of points to redeem.
validation.insufficient_points: The guest does not have enough points to redeem this amount.
validation.reason_required: A reason is required for redemption.

bulk_adjust_form.points_to_action_label: Points to {{action}} for each selected guest

bulk_delete_dialog.title: Are you sure?
bulk_delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete {{count}} guest(s) from your property. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.loyalty_disabled_description: Please enable the loyalty program in settings before enrolling guests.
toasts.loyalty_enroll_success: {{name}} has been enrolled in the loyalty program.
toasts.loyalty_unenroll_success: {{name}} has been unenrolled from the loyalty program.
